channel.title: Summa · Funded research summer schools
channel.description: Funded research summer schools, winter schools, and training schools across many academic fields — environmental & earth science, computing & data science, social sciences, and humanities.
channel.copyright: Data CC BY 4.0 — reuse with attribution and a link back to https://lione12138.github.io/summer-school-radar/

item.title: Social Science Data Analysis — Essex Summer School
item.description: Dates: 5 sessions · 5–12 days each. Location: Colchester, UK. Deadline: latest session deadline 2026-07-17. scholarship · amount not stated · Apply on official page. Topics: satellite, deep learning, data analysis, statistics

item.title: ICOS Summer/Winter School January 2027, application is now open — ICOS
item.description: Dates: 18 Jan – 28 Jan 2027 · 11 days. Location: Europe. Deadline: 2026-07-31. financial support · amount not stated · Apply on official page. Topics: climate, climate change, remote sensing, statistics

item.title: ELLIS Summer School at Unit Saarbrücken — ELLIS
item.description: Dates: 24 Aug – 28 Aug 2026 · 5 days. Location: Saarland University. Deadline: 2026-07-19. Fee about EUR 250 · Apply on official page. Topics: AI
